title: OpenAI is teasing new hardware… for Codex
author: Emma Roth
raw_description: OpenAI is releasing some sort of device related to its AI-powered coding tool, Codex, on July 15th. In a video posted to X on Monday, OpenAI shows a square-shaped device with several buttons, alongside the caption, "Your favorite Codex shortcuts are getting an upgrade." This isn't the mysterious AI-powered device OpenAI is working on with […]
summary: OpenAI 预告将于7月15日发布与Codex相关的硬件设备，视频展示方形多按钮设备，旨在升级Codex快捷键。
analysis_note: 硬件发布预告，与AI/LLM领域相关性一般，技术深度不足，但涉及知名公司产品。
